rule_text: Headlines must be title case (capitalize major words). Example: 'Register for Spring Break Activities' not 'Register for spring break activities'.
Headlines should be active and complete, having both a subject and verb.
Items should be of general student interest and open to all students. Items intended for a small subset of students should be handled through other means.
Student recitals are not included in My UI.
My UI items rotate weekly with different events featured in Highlighted Events each week. Submissions are curated based on timeliness.
Weekly Events cover Monday through the following Sunday. Events are organized chronologically by day. Include dates for events outside the publication cycle week.
Calendar items are linked to the permalink address, not the entire calendar.
All calendar items outside of Moscow should indicate location. Items are Pacific time unless otherwise noted.
Highlighted events need a photo or art that can be cropped to 600x600 pixel square.
Academic Dates and Deadlines section should include 30 days of upcoming information from the U of I academic calendar.
Student job postings are listed for two weeks. Off-campus jobs link to VandalWeb Career Center page.
